description_long: This is a bifold wallet with a sleek, rectangular profile and a dark, matte exterior. The interior features two main compartments: a large pocket for bills and a smaller, lighter-colored slot likely intended for cards or identification. A blue accent strip runs horizontally along the upper interior, adding a subtle touch of color and visual interest. The wallet appears to be made primarily of a synthetic or leather-like material, with a fine, slightly textured finish. There are no visible logos, patterns, or decorative elements on the exterior, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The edges are neatly finished, and the overall construction suggests durability and everyday practicality.
description: A minimalist bifold wallet with a dark matte exterior, blue accent, and interior card and bill slots. The design is sleek, modern, and free of visible logos or patterns.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wallet partially open, revealing the blue accent strip and interior compartments.
description_view_1: Edge-on view of the closed wallet, displaying the slim, rectangular profile and plain dark exterior.
description_view_2: Opposite side view of the wallet, again showing the open configuration with visible card and bill slots.
description_view_3: Top-down view of the open wallet, clearly displaying the blue accent, card slot, and main bill compartment.
